module.name: src
module.purpose: Rust workspace source root for Marix crates with a flat Cargo crate layout. It organizes the agent, client, common, host, first-class marix-protocol, and tool crates. Common now owns config, external adapters, logging, and structure helpers, while marix-protocol owns reusable session/task/step/execution/tool protocol contracts imported by the agent, client, host, and tool crates.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task orchestration; it now imports shared protocol contracts from marix-protocol.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client crate namespace for ClientSession and ClientEvent; it now imports session/task protocol contracts from marix-protocol.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared common crate namespace for config loading, external adapters, logging, and structure utilities; protocol contracts have moved to the marix-protocol workspace crate.

childModules.name: protocol
childModules.purpose: First-class marix-protocol workspace crate for reusable session, task, step, execution, and tool protocol definitions.

childModules.name: host
childModules.purpose: Host crate namespace for HostSession and host-side tool execution; it now imports shared protocol contracts from marix-protocol.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate that defines ToolProgram and native tool executables; it now depends on marix-protocol for tool preview/schema protocol types.
